x-enumeration-literals.name: SalaryPayment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is the payment of salaries.

x-enumeration-literals.name: TreasuryPayment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is related to treasury operations.

x-enumeration-literals.name: AdvancePayment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is an advance payment.

x-enumeration-literals.name: AgriculturalTransfer
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is related to the agricultural domain.

x-enumeration-literals.name: AlimonyPayment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is the payment of alimony.

x-enumeration-literals.name: ChildBenefit
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is related to a payment made to assist parent/guardian to maintain child.

x-enumeration-literals.name: UnemploymentDisabilityBenefit
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is related to a payment to a person who is unemployed/disabled.

x-enumeration-literals.name: BonusPayment.
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is related to payment of a bonus.

x-enumeration-literals.name: CashManagementTransfer
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is a general cash management instruction.

x-enumeration-literals.name: CapitalBuilding
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is related to capital building fringe fortune, ie capital building for retirement.

x-enumeration-literals.name: CharityPayment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is a payment for charity reasons.

x-enumeration-literals.name: CollectionPayment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is a collection of funds initiated via a credit transfer or direct debit.

x-enumeration-literals.name: CommodityTransfer
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is payment of commodities.

x-enumeration-literals.name: CommercialPayment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is related to a payment of commercial credit or debit. (formerly CommercialCredit).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Commission
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is payment of commission.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Costs
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is related to payment of costs.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Copyright
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is payment of copyright.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Dividend
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is payment of dividends.

x-enumeration-literals.name: ForeignExchange
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is related to a foreign exchange operation.

x-enumeration-literals.name: PurchaseSaleOfGoods
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is related to purchase and sale of goods.

x-enumeration-literals.name: GovernmentPayment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is a payment to or from a government department.

x-enumeration-literals.name: InstalmentHirePurchaseAgreement
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is payment for an installment/hire-purchase agreement.

x-enumeration-literals.name: IntraCompanyPayment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is an intra-company payment, ie, a payment between two companies belonging to the same group.

x-enumeration-literals.name: InsurancePremium
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is payment of an insurance premium.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Interest
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is payment of interest.

x-enumeration-literals.name: LicenseFee
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is payment of a license fee.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Loan

x-enumeration-literals.name: Netting
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is related to a netting operation.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Payroll
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is related to the payment of payroll.

x-enumeration-literals.name: PensionPayment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is the payment of pension.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Refund
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is the payment of a refund.

x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is the payment of securities.

x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is a payment for vision care services.
